entry.title: IDC VA797H17D0024 (P00039) awarded to GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADD (759 ITEMS), DELETE (143 ITEMS), DECREASE PRICE (516 ITEMS), AND PRICE INCREASE (3 ITEMS) ON THE GE HEALTHCARE CONTRACT PRICEBOOK VA797H-17-D-0024 REFERENCED IN BLOCK 10A.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IMAGING EQUIPMENT AND SUPPLIES: MEDICAL, DENTAL, VETERINARY

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC VA797H17D0024 (P00041) awarded to GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADD EIGHT(8)SERVICE LINE ITEMS TO THE GE HEALTHCARE CONTRACT PRICEBOOK VA797H-17-D-0024 REFERENCED IN BLOCK 10A.
SEE ATTACHED DOCUMENT.
SEE UPDATED PRICEBOOK GE HEALTHCARE SERVICE ATTACHMENT 5.
ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IMAGING EQUIPMENT AND SUPPLIES: MEDICAL, DENTAL, VETERINARY

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC VA797H17D0024 (P00042) awarded to GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION TO EXERCISE THE FINAL OPTION YEAR FOR THE ABOVE REFERENCED CONTRACT. THE NEW CONTRACT PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE IS 02-18-2022 TO 02-17-2027. THE PRICING INFORMATION REMAINS UNCHANGED. ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN UNCHANGED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IMAGING EQUIPMENT AND SUPPLIES: MEDICAL, DENTAL, VETERINARY

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC VA797H17D0024 (P00043) awarded to GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO UPDATE CONTRACT CLAUSES AND CONTRACT LANGUAGE, INSERTED BELOW. THIS MODIFICATION REFLECTS THE CHANGES TO THE ORIGINAL SOLICITATION IN AMENDMENT SPE2D1-15-R-0001 0016.
ALL OTHER INFORMATION REMAINS THE SAME.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IMAGING EQUIPMENT AND SUPPLIES: MEDICAL, DENTAL, VETERINARY

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC VA797H17D0024 (P00044) awarded to GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADD SEVENTY-EIGHT (78) IMAGING AND ULTRASOUND ITEMS TO THE GE HEALTHCARE CONTRACT PRICEBOOK VA797H-17-D-0024 REFERENCED IN BLOCK 10A. IMAGING ADD: 71 ITEMS ULTRASOUND: ADD: 7 ITEMS UPDATED GE IMAGING ATTACHMENT #5 EFFECTIVE DATE 07-12-2022 AND GE ULTRASOUND ATTACHMENT #5 EFFECTIVE DATE 07-12-2022. ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN IN PLACE.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IMAGING EQUIPMENT AND SUPPLIES: MEDICAL, DENTAL, VETERINARY

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC VA797H17D0024 (P00048) awarded to GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION IS ISSUED TO INCORPORATE THE COMMERCIAL, COMPANY-WIDE SUBCONTRACTING PLAN INTO THE GE HEALTHCARE HIGH TECH MEDICAL EQUIPMENT (HTME) IMAGING CONTRACT. THE PLAN WILL RUN FROM JANUARY 2023 THRU 31 DECEMBER 2023.
